description_for_human: Connect to ServiceNow for incident management and knowledge base search.

functions.name: servicenow_whoami
functions.description: Return the current ServiceNow user profile.

functions.name: servicenow_search_incidents
functions.description: Search incidents using an encoded query string.

functions.name: servicenow_get_incident
functions.description: Retrieve a single incident by sys_id.

functions.name: servicenow_search_kb
functions.description: Search the knowledge base for articles.
